art.summary: Art Basel Hong Kong (March 27-29) is the upcoming focal point, featuring 240 galleries and a new 'Zero 10' digital/tech art sector. The global art market shows cautious optimism with 4% growth in 2025, driven by auction sales, though high-end segment volatility persists.
art.notable: New 'Zero 10' and 'Echoes' sectors emphasize digital innovation and recent works; M+ Facade will feature Shahzia Sikander's '3 to 12 Nautical Miles'.

market.summary: Markets remain closed for the weekend. The S&P 500 and Nasdaq ended the week down due to geopolitical tensions and energy cost concerns.

stats.Outlook: Volatility expected Monday; eyes on geopolitical stability and inflation indices.
